import re

def test_multi_tensor_copy_uses_global_fused_optim_not_multi_tensor_scale__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/colossalai/amp/naive_amp/_fp16_optimizer.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('def _multi_tensor_copy_this_to_that\\s*\\(.*?\\):(?P<body>.*?)(?:\\n\\nclass |\\Z)', source, flags=re.DOTALL)
    assert m is not None, 'Expected to find function `_multi_tensor_copy_this_to_that` in the source file'

def test_multi_tensor_copy_uses_global_fused_optim_not_multi_tensor_scale__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/colossalai/amp/naive_amp/_fp16_optimizer.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('def _multi_tensor_copy_this_to_that\\s*\\(.*?\\):(?P<body>.*?)(?:\\n\\nclass |\\Z)', source, flags=re.DOTALL)
    body = m.group('body')
    assert 'global fused_optim' in body, 'Expected `_multi_tensor_copy_this_to_that` to declare `global fused_optim` before using fused_optim.multi_tensor_scale'

def test_multi_tensor_copy_uses_global_fused_optim_not_multi_tensor_scale__a3():
    source = open('/workspace/colossalai/amp/naive_amp/_fp16_optimizer.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('def _multi_tensor_copy_this_to_that\\s*\\(.*?\\):(?P<body>.*?)(?:\\n\\nclass |\\Z)', source, flags=re.DOTALL)
    body = m.group('body')
    assert 'global multi_tensor_scale' not in body, 'Did not expect stray `global multi_tensor_scale` (typo); should be `global fused_optim` instead'

# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import importlib

def test_layernorm_builder_class_and_metadata_renamed__a1():
    mod = importlib.import_module('op_builder.layernorm')
    assert hasattr(mod, 'LayerNormBuilder'), "op_builder.layernorm must define 'LayerNormBuilder' (builder for layernorm op). This ensures the class name matches the module purpose and built sources."

def test_layernorm_builder_class_and_metadata_renamed__a2():
    mod = importlib.import_module('op_builder.layernorm')
    LayerNormBuilder = getattr(mod, 'LayerNormBuilder')
    assert getattr(LayerNormBuilder, 'NAME', None) == 'layernorm', "LayerNormBuilder.NAME must be 'layernorm' (not 'fused_optim'); the builder name should reflect the layernorm op it builds."

def test_layernorm_builder_class_and_metadata_renamed__a3():
    mod = importlib.import_module('op_builder.layernorm')
    LayerNormBuilder = getattr(mod, 'LayerNormBuilder')
    assert getattr(LayerNormBuilder, 'PREBUILT_IMPORT_PATH', None) == 'colossalai._C.layernorm', "LayerNormBuilder.PREBUILT_IMPORT_PATH must be 'colossalai._C.layernorm' (not 'colossalai._C.fused_optim') to match the layernorm extension."
